item.title: 101 Homemade Food Recipes to Try
item.description: A large collection of homemade recipes features a variety of meals, snacks, and comfort foods prepared with simple cooking techniques.

item.title: How to Make King-Size Candy Bars
item.description: A homemade candy tutorial shows how to create oversized candy bars using melted chocolate, fillings, and simple kitchen techniques.
